response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise for this junior role, has no demonstrated experience in insurance or agile consulting projects, and only has basic German language skills — a hard requirement for client collaboration in Germany.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Demonstrated proficiency in agile practices and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: Minimal to no recent Java experience despite role requiring Java proficiency
German language skills are only basic, failing a core requirement for client work
Overqualified and senior-level background misaligned with entry-level position
